def negative_ldap_search_filter_built_from_user_input_without_escaping():
    rule_id = "ldap_search_filter_built_from_user_input_without_escaping"
    family = "boundaries"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "LDAP search filter string built from user-controlled input without ldap3 or python-ldap escaping."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
